title: PhotochemicalOzoneCreationMaterialResult
description: PhotochemicalOzoneCreationMaterialResult: Result class for resulting Photochemical ozone formation for a particular Material and EPD.

A1.description: Resulting Photochemical ozone formation relating to the Raw Material Supply module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type PhotochemicalOzoneCreation meassured in [kg NMVOC eq].

A2.description: Resulting Photochemical ozone formation relating to the Transport module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type PhotochemicalOzoneCreation meassured in [kg NMVOC eq].

A4.description: Resulting Photochemical ozone formation relating to the Transport module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type PhotochemicalOzoneCreation meassured in [kg NMVOC eq].

A5.description: Resulting Photochemical ozone formation relating to the Construction Installation Process module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type PhotochemicalOzoneCreation meassured in [kg NMVOC eq].

C1.description: Resulting Photochemical ozone formation relating to the De-construction Demolition module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type PhotochemicalOzoneCreation meassured in [kg NMVOC eq].

MaterialName.description: Name of the physical material evaluated.
